templates.name: Invoice Request
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

Thank you for reaching out regarding your invoice.

You can download your invoice from Settings > Billing > Invoices in your account dashboard. Invoices are available in both PDF and CSV formats.

If you need a specific invoice or have questions about line items, please provide your billing period and I'll locate it for you.

Best regards,
Support Team

templates.name: Payment Failed
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

I'm sorry to hear your payment didn't go through. This can happen due to expired cards, insufficient funds, or bank security blocks.

Next steps:
1. Update your payment method at Settings > Billing > Payment Methods
2. We'll automatically retry the charge within 24 hours
3. You'll receive email updates on days 1, 3, and 5 if issues persist

Your account remains active during the 14-day grace period.

Best regards,
Support Team
